title: Romantic Chinese Zha Jiang Mian Noodles
description: A lacto-vegetarian-friendly, Xinjiang-inspired dish featuring crispy bread and air-fried noodles, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the soy sauce, sesame paste, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the noodles and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until they are well coated with the sauce.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter or individual plates.
Top each serving with a slice or two of crispy bread, a spoonful of pickled mustard greens, and a sprinkle of green onions and cucumber slices.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
